nodes.label: DownloadService
nodes.rationale: Encapsulates yt-dlp downloading logic. Handles formats, subtitle downloading, and progress reporting callbacks.

nodes.label: FileService
nodes.rationale: Handles FFmpeg-based operations like merging subtitles, converting media formats, and locating local FFmpeg executables.

nodes.label: MetadataService
nodes.rationale: Manages fetching YouTube video/playlist info and caches results using a configurable Time-To-Live (TTL).

nodes.label: UltraTubeApp
nodes.rationale: Main Textual application component that scaffolds widgets, maps keystrokes, and spawns background download worker threads.

nodes.label: UltraTubeExtractor
nodes.rationale: Facade coordinating core services (Metadata, Download, File) into a clean interface for the TUI frontend to interact with.

nodes.label: Static FFmpeg Integration
nodes.rationale: Bundling FFmpeg via static-ffmpeg removes the system-level dependency requirements for the end-user.

nodes.label: Facade Pattern Coordination
nodes.rationale: UltraTubeExtractor encapsulates downloading, metadata, and processing services behind a simple coordination API.

nodes.label: Concurrent Tab Workers
nodes.rationale: Utilizing Textual background threads avoids freezing the main TUI event loop, enabling multi-tab concurrent downloads.

nodes.label: Metadata Caching
nodes.rationale: Caching video information objects with a 1-hour TTL cuts down redundant network calls during configuration adjustments.
